name: SDLC Required Plus Optional Assessor Approve Pipeline
description: Software-delivery workflow where both required and optional assessors are instantiated and approve.
outcome: Optional assessor participation is respected without changing required-assessor semantics.

definition.process_instructions: The required quality assessor always runs. The optional security assessor is explicitly instantiated for this scenario and is expected to approve the same subject revision.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: change_request
parameters.description: Concrete repository change to implement in the seeded CLI workspace

parameters.name: optional_assessor_contract
parameters.description: When to skip or instantiate the optional assessor and what it must enforce

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
